author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Escape the Backrooms - Official XBOX Launch Trailer
Escape the Backrooms has no-clipped on XBOX Series X|S and XBOX Game Pass, available today. Use 4-player co-op and cross-platform matchmaking to survive some liminal spaces together.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Island of Winds | Icelandic Dreamland Trailer
Step into a hauntingly beautiful vision of 17th century Iceland in Island of Winds. Traverse windswept landscapes, encounter creatures born from Nordic folklore, and unravel a deeply personal journey through mystery, magic, and the echoes of a forgotten world.

Coming 2026 to XBOX Series X|S

text:
A New Bond Rises in 007 First Light & Gear Up for Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 | This Week on XBOX
